details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected by governance contract. A top-level board/ directory exists at /workspace/board/ but reports/board/ is missing.

Per existing governance script exclusion patterns, moltbot/ is treated as a known legacy component, not a reintroduction. If policy requires full removal, this check should be updated.
